empty.focusBodyPost: isn’t on the arrivals board — it’s likely checked out or cancelled. Open Payments or the guest’s folio to review it.
empty.noMatchBody: We couldn’t find any results matching your current filters or search criteria.

checkoutAttention.title: Checkout attention
checkoutAttention.overdueDesc: Past scheduled checkout time and still in-house.
checkoutAttention.departingDesc: Scheduled to check out later today.

departure.tooltipHours_one: {{count}} hour past the scheduled checkout time
departure.tooltipHours_other: {{count}} hours past the scheduled checkout time
departure.tooltipOverdue: {{duration}} and the guest is still in-house. Process the checkout or extend the stay.
departure.tooltipToday: Scheduled to check out later today.

statusBadge.arrivedWaitingTip: Arrived (Waiting): The guest has arrived at the property and is waiting for their check-in process to complete.
statusBadge.checkoutRequestedTip: Checkout Requested: The guest has requested to check out. Review folios and approve.
statusBadge.partiallyArrivedTip: Partially Arrived: Some rooms in the booking are checked in, while others are still expected.
statusBadge.waitingHousekeepingTip: Waiting Housekeeping: The guest can’t check in yet because their assigned room(s) are still being cleaned.
statusBadge.waitingAllocationTip: Waiting Allocation: A physical room number hasn’t been assigned to this booking yet.
statusBadge.checkedInTip: Checked In: The guest has successfully checked in to all rooms in their booking.
statusBadge.noRoomsTip: No Rooms: This booking currently has zero rooms. This is likely an administrative entry.
statusBadge.readyTip: Ready: All rooms are assigned and clean. The guest is ready for check-in.

roomReady.dirtyTip: {{count}} assigned room(s) are currently dirty and need housekeeping attention.
roomReady.cleanTip: All assigned rooms are clean and ready for the guest.
roomReady.readyTipNone: No rooms are ready yet. This is usually because no physical rooms have been assigned to the booking.

dialog.missingStay: Cannot checkout: This booking is missing an active room stay record (expected status "inhouse"). The check-in flow may not have completed properly.
dialog.ctdLine2: Typical reasons: peak-night minimum-stay enforcement, group-block integrity. Confirming will bypass the block — make sure this is authorized by a manager.
dialog.unexpectedMsg: An unknown error occurred while checking out.
dialog.balancePendingMsg:
Cannot checkout manually. Guest has an unpaid balance of ₹{{amount}}.

Please collect payment via the Folio before checking out.
dialog.confirmCheckoutMsg:
Check out Room {{room}} — {{guest}}?
Balance: ₹0 (Settled)

⚠️ Guest has NOT requested checkout.
This is a staff-initiated action.
